process.title: Meet our process
process.description: We keep each project practical: understand the rules, connect the data, build the tool, verify the reports and support the team.

steps.title: Understand rules
steps.body: We map your schedules, shifts, exceptions, approval flow and reporting expectations.

steps.title: Connect data
steps.body: We import or connect machine exports, spreadsheets, databases or existing systems.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: We create the dashboard, application, automation or reporting workflow your team needs.

steps.title: Verify

steps.title: Support

selectedServices.title: Selected services
selectedServices.description: A quick look at the services companies ask us about most often.

items.title: Software, websites and custom apps
items.body:
We build websites, landing pages, portals, admin panels, booking systems, HR tools, inventory tools and custom web apps for any business workflow.

  • Company websites and landing pages
  • Client portals and internal dashboards
  • Custom apps for operations, HR, stock, requests or reporting

items.title: Attendance management software
items.body:
More than an attendance machine.

We turn raw check-in/check-out data into clear reports adapted to your company rules.

  • Custom schedules and rules: configure shifts, grace periods, exceptions and company policies.
  • Attendance results: track late arrivals, absences, shifts, and overtime.
  • Power BI and dashboards: prepare HR, payroll, and management analytics from attendance data.
  • Machine compatibility: works with fingerprint, Face ID, and time clock machines.

items.title: Business analytics and Power BI
items.body:
We replace manual Excel reporting with dashboards leaders can refresh and trust.

  • Power BI executive dashboards
  • Sales, stock, HR, payroll and operations KPIs
  • Excel, database and system-report consolidation

items.title: Data engineering and reporting systems
items.body:
We clean, structure and connect data so reporting, automation and AI can work reliably.

  • Data models and pipelines
  • Databases and reporting architecture
  • Consistent numbers across departments

items.title: AI tools and workflow integration
items.body: We add practical AI to reports, documents, approvals and internal tools: summaries, search, alerts, report checks and workflow assistance.

partnerGrid.body3: Your workflow, your data, your decisions.

hero.title: More than an attendance machine.
hero.description: We turn raw check-in/check-out data into clear HR reports, payroll summaries, dashboards, and attendance analytics adapted to your rules.

whyDesign.body: A normal machine only records punches. Our software analyzes the data, prepares clean reports, and creates a foundation for alerts, summaries, and payroll checks.

cards.title: From punches to reliable reports
cards.body: We work with fingerprint, Face ID, and time clock machines, then apply your schedules, attendance rules, shifts, and overtime logic.
cards.imageAlt: Attendance dashboard and time clock data

capabilities.heading: What attendance data can become
capabilities.body: Attendance data can support HR, payroll, management reports, and decision-ready dashboards when it is cleaned and structured correctly.

cards.title: Custom schedules and rules
cards.body: Configure grace periods, shifts, exceptions, rest days and company-specific attendance policies.

cards.title: Late arrivals, absences and overtime
cards.body: The system calculates attendance results from raw check-in/check-out data according to your logic.

cards.title: Power BI, dashboards and clean reports
cards.body: HR, payroll, and management get reliable summaries, dashboard-ready datasets, and clearer reports instead of confusing machine exports.

process.title: How the attendance setup works
process.description: We connect your machine data, configure your rules and verify results with real attendance cases.

steps.title: Review machines
steps.body: We check your fingerprint, Face ID, or time clock data format and export process.

steps.title: Define rules
steps.body: We map schedules, shifts, late rules, absences, overtime and exceptions.

steps.title: Configure dashboard
steps.body: We set up reports for HR, payroll, and management.

steps.title: Demo and adjust
steps.body: We test real cases and adjust the system until the results match your rules.

principles.heading: 4 principles for useful analytics
principles.body: Dashboards should not only look good. They should be reliable, readable and connected to decisions.
principles.support: Tell us about your current files, KPIs and reports.

humanCentred.title: Readable
humanCentred.body: Every view should be quick to understand for the teams using it.

clientFocused.title: Reliable
clientFocused.body: Calculations, sources and definitions should be clear and checkable.

multidisciplinary.title: Connected
multidisciplinary.body: Dashboards should stand on clean data flows, not copy-paste work.

strategyDriven.title: Actionable
strategyDriven.body: A useful report helps the team decide what to do next.
